prompt: Create a highly detailed 4K vertical anime-style illustration of a young Japanese woman standing in a lush traditional Japanese garden just after rain, surrounded by bright fresh green maple leaves. She wears a white yukata kimono patterned with green maple leaves and small pale blue flowers, tied with an olive-green obi with a small floral ornament, and green-and-white geta sandals. Her dark hair is pinned up in a soft elegant bun with loose strands and small flower hair ornaments; her face is intentionally covered by a smooth rectangular skin-toned blur/blank censor block with no facial features. Pose her leaning forward slightly from the garden path, one arm raised to gently lift a low maple branch above her head, the other hand holding a small pale green drawstring pouch. The setting is a narrow wet stepping-stone path with puddles and glossy reflections, mossy rocks, low shrubs, hydrangea-like blue flowers, a bamboo fence and open wooden gate on the left, a bamboo fence in the background, and a weathered stone lantern on the right. Use soft morning sunlight filtering through dense maple foliage, sparkling raindrops, vivid greens, warm backlight, painterly realism, delicate linework, cinematic depth, rich environmental detail, tranquil romantic atmosphere, no text, no watermark.
